items.title: Crypto Wallet Firm Exodus Buys Baanx and Monavate for $175M
items.description: The U.S.-listed wallet provider is acquiring W3C Corp, the parent company of crypto card and payments firms Baanx and Monavate.

items.title: 5 Financial Transaction Stocks to Watch Despite Rising Tech Costs
items.description: Rising technology expenses may strain margins, but M&A activities, cross-border volume growth and enhanced digital payment solutions suite offer strong tailwinds for the Financial Transaction Services space. Companies like V, MA, PYPL, FISV and GPN are likely to navigate industry challenges.

items.title: 1 Reason I Will Never Sell Visa
items.description: The company's growth opportunities continue to expand as the global financial system develops.

items.title: Can Visa Capture More Holiday Spend Through Link's Festive Rewards?
items.description: V taps festive mall traffic through Link's Christmas rewards, aiming to drive holiday spending and boost transaction activity.

items.title: Plot Twist: Credit Card Giants Are Emerging As Crypto Disruptors
items.description: Once upon a time, cryptocurrencies were supposed to destroy traditional payment processors? Plot twist: the credit card giants are now becoming crypto companies themselves.
